Tests that the cosine of NaN returns NaN using the Math.cos function.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.cos` function when given `NaN` (Not-a-Number) as input. It uses the `assert` function to check that the result of `Math.cos(NaN)` is `NaN`, which is the expected behavior according to the IEEE 754 standard for floating-point arithmetic. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on validating the correct handling of `NaN` by the `Math.cos` function.
